name: Middle of a LinkedList [TortoiseHare Method]
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement:
Given the head of a singly Linked List, return the middle node of the Linked List.


If the Linked List has an even number of nodes, return the second middle one.
constraints:
1 <= number of Nodes in the Linked List <= 105

-104 <= ListNode.val <= 104

examples.explanation: There are 5 nodes, so the middle node is the 3rd Node, with value 7.
There are 6 nodes, thus both the 3rd and 4th nodes are middle. So the 2nd middle node (4th Node) is returned with value 4.
